creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #3)
I apologize for not having expressed myself clearly enough. 

The update of libfilezilla to v0.49.0 can only be built with clang19 if the additional patch (files/extra-patch-lib_libfilezilla_string.hpp) from bug #283373 is included. This patch is only used in the Makefile for clang >=191.
